rcentr_source: Declared classic MAST geometric major radius ~0.85 m (device overview literature). Replace with cited EFIT/device authority R0 before production TORAX ingest.
cocos_note: FreeGS/freegs4e-native GEQDSK layout; no automatic COCOS conversion. Confirm against TORAX COCOS expectations (often COCOS=2 for CHEASE-style) before transport runs.
profile_note: p/f profiles are parametric GS closure knobs — not measured kinetic profiles.
notes: ADR-001. Used only when configs/default.json export_torax_geometry=true (default false). Does not run TORAX.
